title: Apple App Store Scraper
description: Search the Apple App Store or look up apps by ID to extract app details, ratings, prices, and metadata. No login or API key required.

searchTerms.title: Search Terms
searchTerms.description: Keywords to search the App Store, e.g. "weather", "photo editor".

appIds.title: App IDs
appIds.description: Specific App Store app IDs to look up (the numeric trackId, e.g. 284882215). Comma lists are batched.

entity.title: App Type
entity.description: Which kind of apps to return.

maxResultsPerTerm.title: Max Results Per Search Term
maxResultsPerTerm.description: Maximum apps to return per search term (App Store API caps at 200).

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. The iTunes API is generally open; enable proxies to avoid rate limits on large runs.
